cover.era_chip: 日帝 强占 · 1919 · 三一
cover.subtitle:
탑골에서 시작된 외침,
200만 명의 봄.
cover.imagePrompt: Japanese-occupation era illustration, March 1919. ONE young Korean woman in white jeogori and dark navy skirt (Yu Gwansun reference), standing on a low stone step, raising a single small white paper Taegukgi flag with her right hand, mouth open in a steady shout, steady three-quarter view. Behind her: a misty crowd of indistinct white-clad Koreans facing a tall stone pagoda silhouette (Tapgol Park reference). Sky: pale blue-gray with the first hint of cherry blossom branches. Color: dark blue-gray + crimson flag accent + soft pink + ink-black. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 고종 승하. 독살설 확산, 거사 분위기 무르익음.
제암리 학살. 일제 군경의 보복 만행.

outro.tip_headline:
"고종 인산일 → 탑골 → 제암리"
흐름 순서 외울 것.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 도쿄 2·8 선언과 기미 선언의 선후, 민족대표 33인의 종교 구성(천도교·기독교·불교), 제암리 학살과 임정 수립의 시점, 6·10·광주학생운동과 비교 문제가 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized small Taegukgi flag silhouette (no detailed trigrams) raised by a slender hand. LEFT: a tiny stone pagoda silhouette suggesting Tapgol. Cream #F2EDE3 base + crimson #B23A3A accent + soft navy #2E3A4A line. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
